Certified Local Experts
4.91/5 (6842 Completed Requests)

Wayfair Furniture Assembly Services

Our certified experts provide professional Wayfair furniture assembly and installation services for all ready-to-assemble items, including beds, desks, dressers, shelving, and more. Skip the frustration and get connected with experienced local pros who know Wayfair products inside and out.

Get an Instant Quote
Instant Online Quotes
Flexible Scheduling
100% Satisfaction Guarantee

Expert Wayfair Assembly by Room

Our certified local experts specialize in all Wayfair brands, including Sauder, Bestar, and Bush Business Furniture. Filtering by your specific collection ensures a firm, instant quote for your project.

Wayfair Bedroom Beds, Dressers & Murphy Bed installation experts. Wayfair Home Office Professional desk, bookcase, and office suite setup. Wayfair Living Room Entertainment center and shelving unit specialists.

        ?
        NEED HELP?

        Can’t find what you’re looking for?

        Find answers to common questions about booking, service scope, pricing, and order updates in the HandyBuddy Help Center.

        Visit Help Center

        Wayfair Furniture Assembly Services

        • Professional Assembly: Expert unpacking and step-by-step assembly of Wayfair beds, dressers, desks, and dining sets according to specific manufacturer instructions.
        • Secure Installation: Precision fastening of all structural hardware, including hinges, slides, and frames for long-lasting stability.
        • Precise Leveling: Stability checks and leveling to ensure your Wayfair items sit perfectly on any floor surface.
        • Final Placement & Review: Positioning your items in the room of choice followed by a final functionality check.

        Our Wayfair Assembly Process

        1
        Book Online

        Select your furniture type, provide details, and choose an appointment time. Get an instant price by filtering by brand.

        2
        We Match You

        We pair you with a certified local pro experienced in assembling Wayfair and Sauder furniture.

        3
        Assembly Day

        Your pro handles the unboxing, assembly, and cleanup. All work is backed by our 100% Satisfaction Guarantee.

        Learn More About Our Process >

        Preparation & What to Expect

        • Place your boxed Wayfair furniture in the specific room where it will be assembled.
        • Ensure there is adequate open floor space for the pro to work safely and comfortably.
        • Verify that all packages from Wayfair have arrived and appear undamaged before the pro arrives.
        • Keep the assembly area clear of pets and obstacles for safety.

        Wayfair Assembly Frequently Asked Questions

        Do you assemble Wayfair brands like Sauder or Bestar?
        Yes — we are specialists in assembling all Wayfair-distributed brands, including Sauder, Bestar, and Bush Business Furniture.

        How long does assembly take for Wayfair furniture?
        Most items take 1–3 hours. Larger items like Murphy Beds or office suites may take longer.

        Can you anchor my Wayfair bookcase to the wall?
        Yes — if your furniture includes an anti-tip kit, our pros can install it for added safety.

        The HandyBuddy Advantage

        Retailer Specialists

        We specialize in flat-pack furniture, providing faster and more reliable results than general handyman services.

        Happiness Guarantee

        If you aren't satisfied with your Wayfair furniture assembly, we won't quit until it's right.

        Local Certified Pros

        Background-checked experts matched to your location for consistent, high-quality service.

        Book Wayfair Assembly
